TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Del Beshore sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 11 ru 29 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Pennsylvania, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 180 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 75 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *el ő≤es~…ēńßore s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te ** ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a penns~…ējl*ania, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Del Beshore sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 11 ru 29 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Pennsylvania, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 180 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 75 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
